title: Does BuyAndScrap Take a Commission? No Hidden Fees for UK Car Sellers!
metaDescription: No, BuyAndScrap doesn't take a commission when you sell your car. Keep 100% of your sale price with our transparent, fee-free UK service. Get your best quote today!
content:
## Does BuyAndScrap Take a Commission When You Sell Your Car?

No, BuyAndScrap does not take a commission from you when you sell your car. We believe in complete honesty and transparency. When you use BuyAndScrap.com in the UK, the price you're offered for your vehicle is the exact price you receive. There are no hidden fees, charges, or deductions from your final sale. This directly answers the common question: **does BuyAndScrap take a commission**? Our service is entirely free for car sellers across the UK.

### Our Promise: Keep 100% of Your Car's Sale Price

Selling your car should be straightforward and rewarding, not a confusing process filled with unexpected costs. At BuyAndScrap.com, our goal is clear. We connect you directly with a network of trusted UK buyers and authorised treatment facilities (ATFs). These partners are ready to offer you competitive prices for your car.

Whether your vehicle is a reliable family runner or ready for the scrap heap, you'll get great offers. Best of all? Every single penny of the agreed sale price goes straight to you. We do not deduct any fees. You keep what you're offered. Experience a truly free car sale by getting your offers today: [Sell Your Car](/sell).

## So, Does BuyAndScrap Take a Commission from Sellers?

To be absolutely clear: no, BuyAndScrap does not take a commission from you, the seller. The price you accept through our platform is the precise amount that will land in your bank account. You're guaranteed the full agreed value. No nasty surprises.

## How BuyAndScrap.com Stays Free for You (And How We Make Money)

It's natural to wonder how we can offer a free service if we don't charge sellers. Our business model is simple and ensures a win-win for everyone. Our vast network of verified buyers and reputable scrap yards pays a small fee. This fee gives them privileged access to our platform. It also provides them with genuine leads from sellers like you.

This allows us to keep our service completely free for you. You can quickly get multiple competitive offers for your vehicle without paying a penny. Our partners compete to offer the best price. This means you get a great deal, and they find the cars they want to buy.

## Why Choose BuyAndScrap for Your Commission-Free Sale?

Choosing BuyAndScrap means opting for an honest and transparent way to sell your car. You'll never need to worry about the question, **does BuyAndScrap take a commission**, because the answer is always a firm "no". Our platform offers several key benefits:

*   **Multiple Offers:** Compare bids from a wide range of trusted UK buyers. You are under no obligation to accept any.
*   **Quick & Easy Process:** Receive offers fast. Arrange collection with minimal fuss, often within days.
*   **Full Transparency:** Zero hidden costs or deductions. What you agree to is exactly what you get.
*   **Expert Support:** Our friendly UK-based team is always here to help. We guide you through every step.

After selling your current vehicle, perhaps you're thinking about your next car? You can [Browse Cars](/cars) on our marketplace for honest, affordable vehicles. Or, for more helpful tips on selling, check out our [Guides](/guides). Need to quickly check a car's MOT history? Use our [Free MOT Checker](/mot-checker).

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

### Q: Does BuyAndScrap charge any fees to the car seller?
A: No, our service is completely free for car sellers in the UK. We do not charge any fees or take a commission from your car's sale price.

### Q: How does BuyAndScrap make money if sellers don't pay?
A: BuyAndScrap.com earns revenue from the buyers and scrap yards in our network. They pay a small fee for access to our platform and the leads we provide, allowing us to keep our service free for you.

### Q: Will the price offered for my car be exactly what I receive?
A: Yes, absolutely. The price you accept when using BuyAndScrap.com is the precise amount you will receive in your bank account. There are no commission deductions or hidden charges.

### Q: Is BuyAndScrap only for scrap cars?
A: No, we help you sell all types of vehicles. Whether your car is roadworthy or ready for scrap, you can get competitive offers through our platform.
